rationale: Section 11.433 governs late applications for religious organization exemptions under Section 11.20. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption under Section 11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: The chief appraiser shall accept and approve or deny an application for a religious organization exemption under Section 11.20 after the filing deadline provided by Section 11.43
_note: Rule concerns religious organization late exemption applications; proposed change to residence homestead exemption amount has no bearing on this section.
